# Malhan Associates

> Informational website of Malhan Associates, an association of advocates practising before District Courts, High Courts and Tribunals in India. Provided for information only; not for solicitation or advertising under the Bar Council of India rules.

## Pages

- [Home](/): Overview of Malhan Associates and its practice.
- [About](/about): The firm's story, mission, values and advocates.
- [Services](/services): Practice areas including civil, criminal, matrimonial, property, MACT, cheque-bounce, commercial and environmental law.
- [Legal Advice](/legal-advice): How to obtain a confidential consultation, with frequently asked questions.
- [Contact](/contact): Chambers and office addresses, phone numbers and email contacts.
